theme: National Pigs in a Blanket Day
haiku:
Savory hugs wrapped tight,
Porky treasures snug in dough,
Warm bites spark delight.
Happy #NationalPigsInABlanketDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Gentle paws embraced,
Healing hands weave love's soft thread,
Whiskers twitch with joy.
Happy #WorldDayOfVeterinaryMedicine from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages turn like leaves,
Ink and dreams on parchment flow,
Celebrations bright!
#HappyBirthdayAnthonyTrollope from @ClamBakeSanta

Waddling in the snow,
Little tuxedos rejoice,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #WorldPenguinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sun-kissed gardens sway,
Zucchini's harvest whispers,
Baking dreams arise.
Happy #NationalZucchiniBreadDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Notes like silk arise,
Velvet nights wrapped in moonlight,
Joy dances and sings.
#HappyBirthdayEllaFitzgerald from @ClamBakeSanta

Twisted dough delights,
Salted smiles and warm embraces,
Crunch and chew unite.
Happy #NationalPretzelDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Tremors bring us near,
Nature's heartbeat pulses strong,
Together we sway.
Happy #NationalRichterScaleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Feathers dance in flight,
Nature's canvas comes alive,
Joy in every brush.
#HappyBirthdayJohnJamesAudubon from @ClamBakeSanta

Beef aromas rise,
Sizzling dreams on the grill glow,
Gather ‘round, taste joy.
Happy #NationalPrimeRibDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Gentle giants roam,
Muddy banks and leafy greens,
Nature's quiet grace.
Happy #WorldTapirDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cedar trees stand tall,
Echoes of wisdom ring clear,
Nature’s voice calls bright.
#HappyBirthdayRalphWaldoEmerson from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker bright,
Notes of joy in the air sing,
Morse's spark ignites.
#HappyBirthdaySamuelMorse from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm crust hugs sweet blue,
Fields burst forth with laughter's cheer,
A slice of pure joy.
Happy #NationalBlueberryPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Capes flutter like dreams,
Laughter sparks in sunlit skies,
Heroes rise with hope.
Happy #NationalSuperheroDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight spills like gold,
Laughter twirls through the air,
Joy blooms in each heart.
#HappyBirthdayHarperLee from @ClamBakeSanta

Garlic scents perfume,
Butter glistens, shrimp twirl bright,
Feasts of joy unite.
Happy #NationalShrimpScampiDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Feet tap on warm ground,
Colors swirl in joyous flight,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #WorldDanceDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Saxophones whisper,
Chocolate cake and laughter,
Moonlight on the keys.
#HappyBirthdayDukeEllington from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles softly glow,
Laughter wraps the warm evening,
Dreams take flight on wings.
#HappyBirthdayWilliamRandolphHearst from @ClamBakeSanta

Saxophones shimmer,
Rhythms pulse in warm twilight,
Hearts sway, spirits rise.
Happy #InternationalJazzDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm cookies beckon,
Spices swirl in the oven,
Nuts and chocolate dance.
Happy #NationalOatmealCookieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Colors burst like joyous blooms,
Cake's sweet warmth surrounds.
#HappyBirthdayWalterLantz from @ClamBakeSanta
